title: antherotoma senegambiensis
intro: Antherotoma senegambiensis, also known as African red rice tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Antherotoma senegambiensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
